description:
The quiz evaluates practical CSS knowledge, testing familiarity with modern styling techniques and the ability to articulate CSS expertise on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a casual, encouraging tone to motivate learners to assess and improve their CSS skills.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS selectors and specificity, Flexbox and Grid layouts, Best practices for presenting CSS proficiency
Audience: Developers and designers with basic CSS experience who want to gauge and showcase their intermediate to advanced styling abilities.
